subject: FW: invite from Naomi for Jerry Epstein
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: desiree@nc-connect.com [mailto:desiree@nc-connect.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, April 30, 2008 11:27 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Cc: Lesley Groff
Subject: invite from Naomi for Jerry Epstein 


Dear Friend & Colleague,

Ms Naomi Campbell, would like to invite you to a cocktail event for The Friends of climate Change:
The International Renewable Energy Organization (IREO) Diamond Award For Renewable Energy.

The cocktail event will be held at the United Nations Headquarters, NYC (Friday, May 2nd, 2008 at 7pm - 10pm).
IREO focuses on the awareness, implementation and promotion of sustainable energy development.

Please join Naomi Campbell and others in support of the IREO.

Note: 
Please RSVP to: desiree@nc-connect.com
ID is required for entry. 

Best Regards,
Desiree Ejoh
